notes.author: codex
notes.text: Added native registerImporter('todos') + registerExporter('todos') pipeline (reusing shared runTodoImport/buildTodoMarkdown cores). Importer serves the pm todos import route and reads positional <file> arg + --glob/--section/--closed-as/--no-section-tags/--type/--priority/--tags. Parser now handles -/*/+ bullets, nested sub-tasks (indent preserved), ## section headers slugged to tags, and (p0-4)/!/!!/!!! priority markers stripped from titles. Functional: throwaway pm init+install, doctor active 0 failures, imported 7-item nested+sectioned TODO, round-trip export back to markdown verified. build+tsc+test all green.

notes.author: codex
notes.text: DESIGN: pm runtime swallows throws from registerPreflight (runPreflightOverride try/catch -> preflight_override_failed warning) AND from beforeCommand hooks (executeRegisteredHooks try/catch). So a throw at the hook layer cannot abort. Authoritative fail-fast enforcement therefore lives INSIDE the import handler/importer via preflightValidateImportFiles(), which runs as the command action where a thrown CommandError yields a clean non-zero exit BEFORE any pm-store write. The registerPreflight override is registered (scoped to ctx.command==='todos import') as the documented preflight surface + best-effort early check, returning a pass-through decision.

notes.author: codex
notes.text: MANIFEST-ACCURACY CORRECTION: the task brief said to REMOVE the 'schema' capability as a false claim (no registerItemFields/Types/Migration). That premise was WRONG. Runtime fact: registerCommand with a 'flags:' array asserts capability 'schema' (chunk assertExtensionCapability(extension,'schema','registerCommand flags')). All three todos commands (import/export/validate) declare flags, so 'schema' IS required. Removing it caused activation to fail: 'registerCommand flags requires capability schema in extension manifest capabilities'. CORRECT truthful manifest = keep 'schema' (genuinely used to gate command flags) AND add 'preflight'. Final capabilities: [commands, schema, importers, preflight].

notes.author: codex
notes.text: FUNCTIONAL TEST (scratch pm at /tmp/scratch-todos, pm-todos installed --project + activated). (1) MALFORMED todo.txt 'Buy milk due:2026-13-99' -> 'Error: Preflight: 1 structural error(s) ... import aborted before any items were created. line 1: Invalid due date 2026-13-99'; exit 1; pm list-all count: 0. (2) MALFORMED markdown '- [ ] (p9) do something' -> 'Preflight: ... Priority marker (p9) out of range (0-4)'; exit 1; count: 0. (3) --dry-run on malformed ALSO aborts via preflight (no preview). (4) VALID todo.txt (3 tasks) -> 'Imported 3'; count 3 with correct titles. (5) VALID markdown (2 tasks) -> imported 2; count 5. (6) 'todos export' exit 0 (NOT blocked). (7) 'todos validate' on valid file exit 0; on malformed file emits its own validate wording + non-zero (NOT preflight wording). All 42 unit tests pass; build + tsc --noEmit clean.

- Git history: no `private_key`, `provider_token`, or `secret_assignment` matches. The `email_address` class matched 132 historical vendored `node_modules/**` paths in commit `2bd9c4045659`, including package metadata/license or generated files under prefixes such as `node_modules/@opentelemetry/**`, `node_modules/@sentry/**`, `node_modules/@types/node/**`, and other third-party dependency folders. No package-owned path matched.

Blockers: none found for package-owned pm-todos files.
